target_market_label.zh: 澳大利亚（ACCC / 澳大利亚产品安全）
target_market_label.zht: 澳洲（ACCC / 澳洲產品安全）

title.en: China-to-Australia Textiles & Apparel Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国纺织品及服装进入澳大利亚：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國紡織品及服裝進入澳洲：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China textile and apparel documentation against Australian ACCC mandatory standards for care labelling, children's nightwear fire-hazard labelling and design, unsafe azo dye bans, fibre-content and country-of-origin claims, and general consumer-law market access. Australia does not use CE marking for textiles.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国纺织品及服装文件与澳大利亚ACCC强制性标准的差距对照：护理标签、儿童睡衣火灾危险标签及设计、不安全偶氮染料禁令、纤维成分和原产地声明，以及一般消费者法市场准入。澳大利亚纺织品不使用CE标志。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國紡織品及服裝文件與澳洲ACCC強制性標準的差距對照：護理標籤、兒童睡衣火災危險標籤及設計、不安全偶氮染料禁令、纖維成分和原產地聲明，以及一般消費者法市場准入。澳洲紡織品不使用CE標誌。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, laboratory assessment, customs determination, consumer-law ruling, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and brands should verify current Australian Consumer Law, ACCC mandatory standards and bans, Product Safety Australia guidance, and applicable state or territory requirements with qualified legal and technical professionals before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、实验室评定、海关裁定、消费者法裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和品牌方在出货前，应与合格法律及技术专业人士核验现行澳大利亚消费者法、ACCC强制性标准和禁令、澳大利亚产品安全指南以及适用州或领地要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、實驗室評定、海關裁定、消費者法裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和品牌方在出貨前，應與合格法律及技術專業人士核驗現行澳洲消費者法、ACCC強制性標準和禁令、澳洲產品安全指南以及適用州或領地要求。

answer_first.en: Australia does not require CE marking for textiles and apparel. The main China-to-Australia gaps are: mandatory permanent care instructions aligned to AS/NZS 1957; children's nightwear fire-hazard category and warning labelling under the ACCC mandatory standard using AS/NZS 1249; unsafe azo dye restrictions for clothing, textiles, leather and related goods; truthful fibre-content and country-of-origin claims under Australian Consumer Law; and importer responsibility for product safety evidence before supply.
answer_first.zh: 澳大利亚纺织品及服装不要求CE标志。中国出口澳大利亚的主要差距包括：按AS/NZS 1957提供强制性永久护理说明；依据采用AS/NZS 1249的ACCC强制性标准，对儿童睡衣进行火灾危险类别和警示标签管理；服装、纺织品、皮革及相关产品的不安全偶氮染料限制；依据澳大利亚消费者法作出真实的纤维成分和原产地声明；以及进口商在供应前承担产品安全证据责任。
answer_first.zht: 澳洲紡織品及服裝不要求CE標誌。中國出口澳洲的主要差距包括：按AS/NZS 1957提供強制性永久護理說明；依據採用AS/NZS 1249的ACCC強制性標準，對兒童睡衣進行火災危險類別和警示標籤管理；服裝、紡織品、皮革及相關產品的不安全偶氮染料限制；依據澳洲消費者法作出真實的纖維成分和原產地聲明；以及進口商在供應前承擔產品安全證據責任。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official Australian regulator, Product Safety Australia, ACCC, legislation.gov.au, standards body, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs and unofficial summaries are not accepted as primary sources.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true. ACCC mandatory standards, bans, and Australian Consumer Law guidance must be re-verified before any human_reviewed=true release.
